title: IIT Guwahati Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Junior Engineer (Trainee) Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Guwahati. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Guwahati Junior Engineer (Trainee) Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 28 years who possess a three-year Diploma in Civil / Electrical / Mechanical Engineering with minimum 60% marks or 6.0 CGPA along with 2 years of relevant field experience are eligible to apply for these Junior Engineer (Trainee) vacancies. The online application process for

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Three-year Diploma in Civil / Electrical / Mechanical Engineering
qualification.details: Junior Engineer (Trainee) - Civil Engineering: Three-year Diploma in Civil Engineering from a recognized University / Institute. Minimum 60% marks or 6.0 CGPA. Minimum 2 years of relevant field experience in Building maintenance, Preparation of technical estimates, Tender preparation, Concrete works and Other site-related civil engineering activities. Candidates possessing higher qualifications such as B.E./B.Tech are not eligible. Junior Engineer (Trainee) - Electrical Engineering: Three-year Diploma in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University / Institute. Minimum 60% marks or 6.0 CGPA. Minimum 2 years of relevant field experience in HT/LT substation maintenance, DG (Diesel Generator) maintenance. Candidates possessing higher qualifications such as B.E./B.Tech are not eligible. Junior Engineer (Trainee) - Mechanical Engineering: Three-year Diploma in Mechanical Engineering from a recognized University / Institute. Minimum 60% marks or 6.0 CGPA. Minimum 2 years of relevant field experience in the maintenance of air conditioning systems. Candidates possessing higher qualifications such as B.E./B.Tech are not eligible.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Engineer (Trainee) posts at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Junior Engineer (Trainee) posts at IIT Guwahati is 08-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Engineer (Trainee) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for the Junior Engineer (Trainee) posts at IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Engineer (Trainee) posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a three-year Diploma in Civil, Electrical, or Mechanical Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.0 CGPA, along with at least 2 years of relevant field experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Engineer (Trainee) posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Junior Engineer (Trainee) posts is 28 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Engineer (Trainee) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the IIT Guwahati Junior Engineer (Trainee) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online through the official IIT Guwahati website.

faq.question: Q8. Are candidates with higher qualifications like B.E./B.Tech eligible for these posts?
faq.answer: No, candidates possessing higher qualifications such as B.E./B.Tech are not eligible for these specific Junior Engineer (Trainee) posts.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Junior Engineer (Trainee) positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the "Important Links" section of this article.
